When I first moved to college, I was surprised that both my roommates, a Mozambican boy and a Bangladeshi boy, actually used to write detailed letters to their parents back home and not talk as much on the phone. This was for very different reasons though. The Mozambican boy was doing it purely as an exercise to improve writing skills but the Bangladeshi boy often had connectivity issues back home. Whose parents didn't have great phone connectivity at home?
